what_it_does: Renders a design-system preview card showing a nine-step typography scale with labels, sample text, and size/weight annotations.
observations: Includes dsCard metadata for Brand / Type scale with a 700x380 viewport and a Display to Eyebrow subtitle.
Loads _card.css and uses shared CSS variables for fonts, colors, accent, and borders.
Uses a flex column card containing grid rows with name, rendered sample, and pixel/weight columns.
Shows Display, H1, H2, H3, H4, Body, Body sm, Caption, and Eyebrow rows.
Display through H3 use the display font; body-related rows use the body font; Eyebrow is uppercase bronze text.
standouts: Self-contained preview of a full typography ramp.
Combines rendered type samples with compact implementation annotations.
Uses baseline-aligned grid rows to compare type sizes cleanly.
conventions: Uses a dsCard HTML comment as preview metadata.
Keeps shared visual tokens in CSS variables from _card.css.
Uses short class names for local preview styling.
Applies per-row typography values inline rather than through named reusable classes.
concerns: Caption sample text says "12 captions / labels" while the annotation column says "11 / 500".
Typography values are repeated inline, so edits require touching individual rows.
notes: This file is a compact visual specimen for the ConceptV typography scale.
questions: Is the caption intended to be 11px or 12px?
Are the inline typography values meant to mirror token names elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated Type scale purpose matches the actual rendered nine-row typography ramp.
intention_signals: It seems intended to make the brand type scale quickly inspectable by pairing each text role with a live sample and numeric size/weight metadata.
novelty: Uses a small card artifact format with embedded metadata and live CSS-variable-driven typography samples.
contribution: Provides a portable typography scale specimen that a fused system would keep as a reference for text roles, font choices, weights, colors, and display annotations.
summary_for_embedding: HTML preview card for the ConceptV design system typography scale, showing nine text roles from Display to Eyebrow with samples and size/weight labels.
intention_for_embedding: This was for documenting and visually validating the brand type hierarchy in a compact design-system card.
